articles.title: Mumbai Founder Hires 64-Year-Old Intern, Calls It Startup's 'Best Decision'; Internet Asks 'Why Is He An Intern?'
articles.description: A Mumbai founder’s decision to onboard a 64-year-old intern has gone viral online, with many praising the move as a powerful reminder that experience nesver goes out of style

articles.title: How employer contributions to NPS can push effective tax-free income to ₹13.5 lakh
articles.description: With most taxpayers now opting for the new tax regime, employer contributions to the National Pension System (NPS) have emerged as one of the few remaining tax-saving opportunities. Experts say Section 80CCD(2) can effectively push the tax-free income threshold from ₹12 lakh to around ₹13.5 lakh while helping employees build a retirement corpus.

articles.title: UP CM Yogi Unveils Hydrogen-Powered Buses: Check Special Features, Passenger Capacity
articles.description: The buses have been developed under the Green Hydrogen-Based Mobility Project by NTPC Dadri and are expected to strengthen UP's transition towards green transportation.

articles.title: Ethanol to hydrogen: BPCL’s transition roadmap
articles.description: Bharat petroleum looks to diversify its operations with continued focus on hydrocarbons and new energy applications.

articles.title: She Lost Her Father, Her Mother Cleaned Toilets To Get Food, But One Audition Changed Her Life
articles.description: Bharti Singh has never hidden the financial difficulties she faced during her childhood.

articles.title: Revanth Reddy Pushes For Govt To Purchase Paddy, Other Crops From State | Telangana | News18
articles.description: Telangana Chief Minister A Revanth Reddy alleged on Monday that the Centre was not giving the state due importance in crop procurement, warning of a statewide agitation if it failed to purchase paddy and other crops from the state.While addressing a public meeting in Kagaznagar town of Kumram Bheem Asifabad district, Reddy said the state government would “declare a war" on the Centre if it failed to purchase crops from Telangana by June 15. n18oc_india News18 Mobile App - https://onelink.to/desc-youtube

articles.title: Maharashtra restricts bulk fuel purchase at petrol pumps, caps diesel sale at 200 litres per day
articles.description: The government said adequate fuel stocks are available but cited concerns over large diesel purchases by industrial consumers from retail outlets.

articles.title: 14.6 lakh seats cut by Air India Group in June; metros worst affected
articles.description: Air India Group as part of its network downsizing has cut 14.6 lakh seats in June this year with connectivity to all metros but Delhi hit the most.

articles.title: 'Mega bubble or fairy tale?': Uday Kotak reacts to SpaceX's historic IPO
articles.description: Veteran banker Uday Kotak questioned SpaceX's massive valuation, calling it a "huge bet on the future" that defies traditional metrics. Elon Musk's company debuted on Wall Street, making him the world's first trillionaire. Despite concerns about unproven technologies and cash burn, investor faith remains strong, highlighting a debate on future value versus current metrics.

articles.title: Why Siddaramaiah’s final CM act signals his long game at OBC politics vanguard
articles.description: Just before Shivakumar replaced him as CM, Siddaramaiah accepted a caste survey report before clearing Rs 71.85 crore community halls and hostels for 150 OBC groups

articles.title: Scaling growth and risk: Why managed services are now mission-critical for India Inc
articles.description: The question should no longer be about whether to adopt managed services but about how to use and leverage them to transform functions.

articles.title: Annapurna Bhandar: Stuck With The Form? Here's How To Get Your Rs 3000
articles.description: The Annapurna Bhandar scheme's form filling is in full swing and will continue for the next 3 months. But many applicants are facing some common problems. Don't worry, we've got easy solutions for all of them right here.

articles.title: India's Bio-Energy Future: Experts Call for Big Push on Implementation
articles.description: At the India Bio-Energy Conference 2026, experts urged a major push for implementation and a single nodal agency to turn India into a bio-energy export engine, highlighting the vast potential in biofuels and Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF).

articles.description: Mumbai Customs seizes 11.8 kg Ganja worth Rs 11.82 crore; one arrested

articles.title: Couples don't need equal incomes, but they do need financial transparency
articles.description: Money problems in relationships are often less about money itself and more about surprises. Being open about finances can help couples avoid misunderstandings, build trust and make better decisions together.

articles.title: What is an add-on credit card, and should you get one?
articles.description: An add-on credit card can make life easier when you're managing family expenses. But before handing one to a spouse, parent or child, it's worth understanding who is really responsible when the bill arrives.

articles.description: Returns differ across bank categories, with small finance banks leading and larger banks offering comparatively lower rates

articles.title: Indian rupee also gains big against the US dollar
articles.description: In a remarkable turn of events on Friday, the Indian rupee surged against the US dollar, largely due to a significant decrease in crude oil prices worldwide. Investor confidence was further lifted by President Trump’s remarks hinting at a potential resolution to the conflict with Iran. The currency settled at 95.

articles.title: Consumer commission grants relief to homebuyer, directs MHADA unit to give compensation, allot flat
articles.description: Consumer commission grants relief to homebuyer, directs MHADA unit to give compensation, allot flat

articles.title: Notices to food brands over consumer complaints
articles.description: FSSAI has issued notices to Nestlé, KFC, Flipkart, and Open Secret over complaints of selling contaminated products and hygiene issues.

articles.title: SpaceX strikes rare deal to pay $0 to bankers for IPO greenshoe
articles.description: Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and AI firm won’t pay any fee if underwriters on the offering agree to exercise their ability to sell another 15% of shares, an option known as a greenshoe in Wall Street parlance.

articles.title: Bulk sale ban, cap on diesel at pumps
articles.description: India restricts fuel sales to bulk users and caps diesel at 200 liters/day to curb revenue losses as crude prices fall below $86/bbl amid geopolitical tensions.

articles.title: Startup Mantra: Building India’s ‘salt & sugar’ battery ecosystem
articles.description: Rechargion Energy's sodium-ion batteries, made from salt and agro-waste, aim to enhance India's energy independence and sustainability, challenging lithium dominance.

articles.title: PNB increases dollar deposit rates to 6.1%; Here's what other banks are offering
articles.description: Punjab National Bank has raised interest rates on dollar-denominated FCNR(B) deposits to as high as 6.1%, joining a growing list of banks competing for NRI foreign currency funds. The move comes after the RBI announced support for hedging costs on new 3-5 year FCNR(B) deposits until September 2026.

articles.title: Elon Musk's net worth rises by Rs 13 lakh crore post SpaceX's stellar market debut
articles.description: Musk's net worth rose to $1.11 trillion at the end of market hours, according to data from the Bloomberg Billionaires Index.

articles.title: RBL Bank taps HDFC veteran Bhavin Lakhpatwala as CFO
articles.description: RBL Bank has appointed Bhavin Lakhpatwala as its new Chief Financial Officer. Lakhpatwala joins from HDFC Bank, bringing over 25 years of finance experience. This appointment fills a vacant position and comes as Emirates NBD moves to acquire a controlling stake. The new CFO is expected to guide the bank through its ownership transition and future growth phase.

articles.title: Centre restricts bulk fuel buying at retail pumps, caps diesel sales
articles.description: Bulk users include state governments’ transport undertakings, IT parks, malls, industrial units and defence units.

articles.title: CM Yogi flags off city bus as airport nears launch
articles.description: Uttar Pradesh CM Yogi Adityanath launched electric bus services in Noida, Greater Noida, and YEIDA, enhancing connectivity and promoting green mobility.

articles.title: Reinsurance buffers crash claim, Tata AIG logs Rs 1,008 crore profit
articles.description: The General Insurance Corporation had estimated claims of over $400 million last year from the Air India Ahmedabad crash. Since then, reinsurers have settled some claims. Tata AIG, which was the lead insurer, had a 45% share of the risk. “We fully provided for it in that same quarter itself. Net of reinsurance, our exposure was less than Rs 50 crore,” said Amit Ganorkar, MD & CEO, Tata AIG General.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Aristotle: 'Our problem is not that we aim too high and miss, but that...' Life lessons on success, goals, hard work, human nature and why one should stay focused to excel in life
articles.description: Quote of the Day by Aristotle highlights the importance of setting bigger goals in life. The quote says that people often limit themselves by aiming too low instead of challenging their potential. It teaches lessons about success, goals, hard work, focus, growth, human nature, and personal development. The message remains relevant for students, professionals, entrepreneurs, and anyone working toward long-term achievements.

articles.title: No formal proposal yet, say senior NCP(SP) leaders amid buzz over merger with Congress
articles.description: Senior NCP(SP) leaders state no formal merger proposal with Congress exists, amid ongoing speculation and internal party concerns.

articles.title: Paramount’s $111 billion Warner Bros takeover clears US antitrust hurdle
articles.description: The US Justice Department has approved Paramount Skydance’s $111 billion Warner Bros. takeover, despite political concerns, lawsuits, and Hollywood opposition.

articles.title: Lucknow Cantt to replace old water pipelines
articles.description: Lucknow's Cantonment Board will replace outdated pipelines and build new tube wells, improving water quality and supply for nearly 100,000 residents.

articles.title: SpaceX shares close 19% higher after historic $75 billion IPO
articles.description: The shares jumped as much as 31% above their $135 offering price, before closing up 19% at $160.95.

articles.title: AMD Stock Ended Friday’s Session Nearly 5% Higher — What Triggered The Rally?
articles.description: Citi upgraded AMD to ‘Buy’ and lifted its price target, stating that investors should also be looking at the company’s graphics processing unit’s potential.

articles.title: Bihar govt releases ₹998-cr for March to May salary, pension to varsities and colleges
articles.description: The funds have been released on the basis of interim approval of the universities’ budget and the concerned authorities have to submit utilisation certificates within a month, says the government letter.

articles.title: For JEE Advanced candidates: 450 register for IIML’s first 4-yr UG course with 60 seats
articles.description: Over 150 students have enrolled for IIM Lucknow's new BS in AI and Business Analytics, with significant interest from JEE Advanced candidates.

articles.title: Bihar: Govt to provide 3 decimal land to 8-10K landless families from June 15
articles.description: The families have been identified under the Basera-2 project after a survey over one and a half years.

articles.title: Zuckerberg says Meta made 'mistakes' in AI workforce shift
articles.description: June 12 : Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg has told employees that the social media giant has made mistakes in its AI transformation of its workforce, according to an internal memo seen by Reuters. Zuckerberg is pumping hundreds of billions of dollars into AI as he seeks to reshape his company's inner workings around

articles.title: NHAI says compensation for sandalwood farmer deposited in court
articles.description: NHAI confirms compensation for sandalwood farmer T.N. Vishukumar has been deposited in court amid ongoing disputes over land acquisition.

articles.title: Big corporates plug into electric trucks as rising diesel and logistics expenses drive a rethink
articles.description: Indian companies are rapidly investing in electric trucks. This shift is driven by fluctuating diesel prices and a focus on sustainability. Major firms like Ultratech Cement and Vedanta are expanding their electric fleets. Manufacturers report a surge in corporate interest. Electric truck registrations are soaring, indicating growing acceptance and deployment across various sectors.

articles.title: BLK, STT In Focus — Who Will Manage New York City’s $92B Pension Portfolio?
articles.description: New York City’s pension system is opening a fresh bidding process for tens of billions of dollars in passive equity assets as existing management contracts near expiration.

articles.title: Mulberry Plant: Grow At Home, Get Heavy Fruit In Extreme 50°C Heat!
articles.description: Want to grow a fruit plant at home that gives lots of fruit with very little effort? We'll tell you how you can grow a mulberry plant that thrives and fruits even in scorching 50°C heat.

articles.title: Examination system in crisis: The urgent need to shift focus from cost to capability
articles.description: Recent examination fiascos highlight a critical need to reform India's testing system. Current procurement practices favor low costs over essential capabilities. This approach compromises physical security, cybersecurity, personnel quality, and real-time monitoring. A shift towards evaluating demonstrated capability, resilience, and accountability is crucial. This will rebuild trust in the examination ecosystem and ensure fairness for students.

articles.title: AM Green, VOCPA ink pact for green ammonia plant
articles.description: Under the memorandum of understanding signed on May 28, AM Green plans to build marine bunkering capacity of up to 200,000 metric tonnes of green ammonia annually by 2029-30, backed by an investment of about ₹2,000 crore.

articles.title: Raj extends MSP wheat procurement till June 19, raises target to 28.5L MT
articles.description: Raj extends MSP wheat procurement till June 19, raises target to 28.5L MT

articles.title: HOOD Stock: Robinhood Buckles Under SpaceX IPO Demand, Users Report Trading Issues
articles.description: The brokerage’s official help account posted on X that the platform saw “record-breaking traffic today.”

articles.title: Parandur airport crucial for State to achieve $1.5 trillion economy: experts
articles.description: Experts emphasize the urgent need for Parandur airport to enhance Chennai's connectivity and support Tamil Nadu's $1.5 trillion economy goal.

articles.title: Retail inflation edges up to 3.9% in May
articles.description: Economists expect price pressures to intensify further in June, driven by the continued pass-through of earlier increases in transport and cooking fuel costs amid continued supply disruptions due to the West Asia conflict.
